UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT RICKY CHEN AND AMIN WU'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO PAYER FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT IF AND WHEN DEFENDANTS RAISE THE ISSUE OF CONTRACT ENFORCEABILITY IN THEIR ANSWER. MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED AS TO LINE 17-18 OF COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFFS FAIL TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THEIR BROAD INTERPRETATION OF THE RENT ORDINANCE. ADDITIONALLY THERE ARE NO ALLEGATIONS IN COMPLAINT THAT DEFENDANTS ATTEMPTED TO RECOVER POSSESSION UNDER "NO-FAULT" PROVISIONS OF THE RENT ORDINANCE AND THAT DEFENDANT'S ALLEGED ATTEMPT TO RECOVER POSSESSION OCCURRED AFTER PLAINTIFFS HAVE RESIDED AT THE UNIT FOR 12 OR MORE MONTHS. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HARRY M. DORFMAN, CLERK: MARS GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Semel, Esq., of Haapala, Thompson & Abern, LLP, (510-273-8534) for Ricky Chen et al, Defendants and Moving party.
Christopher R. Boldig, Esq., of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709) for Guillermo Fernandez, Plaintiff and Opposing Party.

ARGUED. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT RICKY CHEN and AMIN WU's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED as follows:

Motion to Strike is GRANTED as to payer for attorney's fees without prejudice. Plaintiff may move to amend the complaint if and when Defendants raise the issue of contract enforceability in their answer.

Motion to Strike is GRANTED as to line 17-18 of Complaint. Plaintiffs fail to cite any authority for their broad interpretation of the Rent Ordinance. Additionally there are no allegations in Complaint that Defendants attempted to recover possession under "no-fault" provisions of the Rent Ordinance and that Defendant's alleged attempt to recover possession occurred after Plaintiffs have resided at the unit for 12 or more months. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Mars Goodman, not Reported (D501)
